requirements_summary: 68W experience counts toward EMT certification with minimal additional coursework. Most states recognize military medical training.

civilian_pathway: Certified Nursing Assistant / Licensed Practical Nurse
requirements_summary: Navy medical training provides strong foundation for CNA and LPN certifications. Experience often counts toward licensing requirements.
Military aircraft maintenance experience qualifies for FAA A&P certification. Written exam and practical test required.
25B IT experience qualifies for Security+ with DoD 8570 requirements. Path to CISSP and advanced certifications.
Military driving experience satisfies CDL requirements. Some states waive written exams for military drivers.
Military HVAC training counts toward apprenticeship hours. EPA 608 exam required for refrigerant handling.
Military electrical training counts toward apprenticeship hours. Reduces total training time significantly.
Military welding experience qualifies for AWS certifications. Several certifications available (SMAW, GMAW, FCAW).
Military equipment operation experience counts toward civilian certification hours.
Military fire protection training counts toward Firefighter I & II certifications.
Military MP training often waives academy prerequisites. Experience counts toward state certification.
Naval service time counts toward USCG officer and crew member licenses.
Military medical training provides foundation for nursing school. Prerequisite courses often reduced.
Military leadership and operations experience counts toward PMI requirements. CAPM entry-level certification available.
Military IT experience counts toward CompTIA and Cisco certifications. Multiple certification paths available.

issuing_agency: National Institute for Automotive Service Excellence
requirements_summary: Military mechanic training counts toward apprenticeship. ASE testing available in multiple specialties.
Direct path to FAA certifications. Military experience exceeds minimum requirements.
Military power generation experience counts toward state licensing. Technical knowledge often exceeds requirements.
Military supply chain experience counts toward APICS certifications.
Military construction and project management experience counts toward CMAA requirements.
Military plumbing experience counts toward apprenticeship hours and license requirements.
Military IT experience provides foundation for cloud and data certifications.
Military dental training counts toward RDH prerequisites. Shortened program possible in many states.
Military HVAC training qualifies for immediate EPA 608 exam. Certification required for all refrigerant work.
Military quality control experience counts toward ASQ certifications.
Military pharmacy experience counts toward PTCB exam eligibility. Direct path with minimal additional coursework.
Military safety training and experience counts toward CSP requirements.
Military driving experience waives written test in many states. HazMat and Tanker endorsements available.

Space Force Guardians in cyber and space operations roles have extensive technical training directly applicable to CompTIA Security+, CISSP, and Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH). DoD 8570 mandates Security+ for many billets, so many Guardians are already certified before separation.

Space Force engineers with accredited engineering degrees and verified experience qualify for PE licensure. INCOSE CSEP directly recognizes systems engineering expertise from space systems work. Both are highly valued in defense contracting and government agencies.

civilian_pathway: Intelligence Analyst / Program Manager / Cleared Contractor
requirements_summary: Space Force intelligence Guardians with TS/SCI clearances transition strongly into IC, defense contracting, and national labs. PMP certification leverages leadership experience. CompTIA CySA+ is directly applicable to cyber-intelligence roles. Clearance retention is the most valuable credential for this pathway.

civilian_pathway: PADI Dive Professional — Instructor & Divemaster Certifications
certification_name: Sea Experience — PADI Veteran Scuba Program
requirements_summary: Full PADI dive career training. Accepts Ch 30, 31, 33, 35. VA specialist on staff assists enrollment. Job placement support. FL Commission for Independent Education licensed.

civilian_pathway: PADI Professional Dive Certifications — 9 Career Packages
certification_name: Pura Vida Divers — 9 VA-Approved Career Packages
issuing_agency: PADI / Pura Vida Divers (Singer Island, FL)
requirements_summary: Only VA-approved dive shop in Palm Beach County. 9 professional career packages from Open Water through Instructor. Post-9/11 GI Bill and VR&E (Ch 31) accepted.

civilian_pathway: PADI Dive Professional + DoD SkillBridge Pathway
certification_name: Emerald Coast Scuba — PADI VA + SkillBridge
requirements_summary: VA-approved for Post-9/11 GI Bill. DoD SkillBridge partner for active-duty transitions. Warrior Care Program MOU. Triple pathway: GI Bill + SkillBridge + Warrior Care.

certification_name: Trident Adventures — Dive + Helicopter Cast Master
requirements_summary: Navy SEAL owned. GI Bill approved (Ch 30 & 33). Dedicated VA training website (trident-va.com). Unique Helicopter Cast Master program unavailable elsewhere.

civilian_pathway: PADI Career Development Course (CDC) — Dive Instructor
certification_name: Dive Right In Scuba — PADI CDC
issuing_agency: PADI / Dive Right In Scuba (Orland Park, IL)
requirements_summary: Founded by Vietnam veteran. IL Dept of Veterans Affairs approved. One of 40 PADI Career Training Centers worldwide. $12,500 tuition covered by GI Bill. PTSD support focus.
Most VA-approved dive programs of any single dive shop (18 programs). SDI/TDI recreational and technical diving certifications.

civilian_pathway: USCG Captain's License / Master & Mate Certifications
requirements_summary: Largest private maritime school in US since 1983. 45,000+ sq ft campus. USCG Captain's License, STCW, radar, firefighting, sea survival. Must submit VA COE. Staff assists enrollment.

civilian_pathway: Commercial Diver — Underwater Welding, Salvage, Hazmat
requirements_summary: Gold standard commercial diving school. Veteran-operated since 1968. 7-month program. Up to $25,162 tuition + $2,748/mo housing covered by Post-9/11 GI Bill.

civilian_pathway: Commercial Diver — Underwater Welding & Diving Operations
requirements_summary: Commercial diving and underwater welding training. Accepts Ch 33, Ch 31, Ch 30. Dedicated VA benefits page with enrollment guidance.
Nonprofit 501(c)(3) maritime school. VA-approved for Ch 33 and Ch 31. USCG direct-entry pipeline via Letter of Intent. Professional Mariner + Marine Surveying.

civilian_pathway: Marine Systems Technology + Boatbuilding + Digital Fabrication
requirements_summary: GI Bill, VR&E (Ch 31), AND SkillBridge accepted. ACCSC accredited. Marine Systems, Boatbuilding, and Digital Fabrication programs.

civilian_pathway: AOS Boatbuilding Degree + Marine Systems Diploma
requirements_summary: GI Bill approved. ACCSC accredited. WA State Veteran Supportive Campus. AOS degree. Veteran Resources Specialist on staff.
Approved for Post-9/11 GI Bill and VR&E. Maine SAA approved. 50,000+ sq ft campus. Yacht design, composite and wooden boatbuilding since 1978.

civilian_pathway: Maritime Officer Licenses — AB to Mate to Master
requirements_summary: GI Bill accepted. 80-acre campus. 150+ maritime courses. Full career ladder from AB to Mate, Mate to Master. 30+ year track record.
Montgomery GI Bill approved. VR&E approved. VA conducts regular audits. 501(c)(3) nonprofit. 20% military discount.

civilian_pathway: Commercial Pilot License — Part 141 VA Approved
requirements_summary: VA Approved Part 141 pilot school. ArmyCOOL approved. Vocational path ~$15K/yr. Liberty University partnership for degree path up to $45K covered.

civilian_pathway: Airline Pilot — VR&E (Ch 31) + SkillBridge Flight Training
certification_name: Flex Air Flight Academy — VR&E Flight Training
requirements_summary: Specifically designed for VR&E Ch 31. No annual limits for 20%+ disability rating. Veteran-owned. DOD SkillBridge eligible. Full airline pilot pipeline.

civilian_pathway: Airline Transport Pilot — ATP CTP + Type Ratings
certification_name: ATP Flight School — Airline Career Pilot
requirements_summary: Largest flight school in US. WEAMS institution #26001110. GI Bill accepted for ATP CTP and type ratings. 88+ locations nationwide.
ACCET-accredited. CalVet approved. $21,900 tuition = 9 months of benefits. Monthly Housing Allowance during 10-week training. Elite executive protection pipeline.

certification_name: ESS Global Corp — Executive Protection Training
issuing_agency: ESS Global / DOE + VA Certified (Tampa, FL)
requirements_summary: Only GI Bill approved executive protection school in Florida. DOE and VA certified. 300+ hours instruction. Active security operations in 60+ countries.
US Dept of Labor National Training Standard. Post-9/11 GI Bill accepted. EP + Cyber Security dual tracks. BAH and stipend for eligible veterans.
World-class cybersecurity training. All programs GI Bill eligible. Accredited. GIAC certifications included. 100% online available. VA pays tuition directly.
Triple-approved: DoD, VA, and SkillBridge. DoL Registered Apprentice. CompTIA partner. 17-week program. Zero cost via SkillBridge.

certification_name: ACI Learning Tech Academy — IT Training
requirements_summary: Accepts 6 VA benefit types: VET TEC, Ch 30, Ch 31, Ch 33, MyCAA, Army Credentialing Assistance. VET TEC preserves GI Bill entitlement.

issuing_agency: AWS / Workshops for Warriors (San Diego, CA)
requirements_summary: Nonprofit for veterans. 16-week program to national welding certs. Job placement with Boeing, SpaceX, Ford. FREE or GI Bill funded. Navy veteran founded.

certification_name: Elite Welding Academy — GI Bill Welding School
requirements_summary: GI Bill approved. WEAMS #25146043. Post-9/11 covers 100% tuition + tools. 6-month welding program.
GI Bill and VR&E accepted at approved campuses. VA certifying official on every campus. Piedmont, Columbia, Charleston, Rock Hill, Houston.
Dedicated military benefits page. 40-100% VA educational benefits. Southern California location with military focus.

civilian_pathway: Heavy Equipment Operator + Crane Operator Certification
requirements_summary: Post-9/11 GI Bill AND VR&E accepted. Military Friendly school. 3-week, 120-hour programs. 90% job placement rate. 10+ years serving veterans.
DANTES approved. Post-9/11 GI Bill up to $22,805. Private 350-acre FL training facility. 2-week courses for bulldozer, excavator, loader, backhoe.
VA-approved online gunsmithing school. GI Bill + VR&E accepted. DEAC accredited. Flexible self-paced learning. Dedicated military veterans page.
VA-approved correspondence school since 1993. DVD/online self-paced format. GI Bill + VR&E accepted. Good for rural veterans.

civilian_pathway: FAA Part 107 Drone Pilot + Advanced Drone Technology
requirements_summary: Approved by US Dept of VA for GI Bill. Drone technology, VR/3D, and agricultural drone programs. Featured on VA.gov news.
VA education benefits eligible for WFR, EMT, WEMT, Summer Semester. NREMT certified. VA pays tuition directly. Spring/Fall semesters excluded.

civilian_pathway: EMT & Paramedic Certification — FL Title 38 Approved
requirements_summary: Approved by FL Dept of VA under Title 38, Chapter 36. Ch 33 and Ch 31 accepted. EMT and Paramedic certification programs.
